ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the cryptocurrency */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain_type" TEXT /* Type of blockchain used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the exchange rate belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "changes" REAL /* Changes in exchange rate */,
  "changes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage changes in exchange rate */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days_of_week" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day of the week */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate history entry */,
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate the history belongs to */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day of the week the exchange rate was recorded on */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date the exchange rate was recorded on */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "changes" REAL /* Changes in exchange rate */,
  "changes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage changes in exchange rate */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rate_history_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES days_of_week ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rate_history_exchange_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rate_history_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate the chart belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the chart data */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "changes" REAL /* Changes in exchange rate */,
  "changes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage changes in exchange rate */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_exchange_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate the report belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report data */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "changes" REAL /* Changes in exchange rate */,
  "changes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage changes in exchange rate */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_exchange_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert entry */,
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate the alert belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, cleared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_exchange_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed to the alert */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert the user subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the user subscribed to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_subscriptions_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert the log belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform of the social media post (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the social media post */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id")
)
